reviews.comment:
Quiero que sepan que los chicos que atienden son lo más, acabo de perder mi cartera con la billetera y todos los documentos y tarjetas en esta estación de servicio, volvimos cuando nos dimos cuenta y ellos me devolvieron todo, no me faltó ni una moneda. Que lindo es encontrar en la vida a este tipo de gente! Que la vida les retribuya con mucho más de lo que me devolvieron a mi. Mil gracias!!!!!

(Translated by Google)
I want you to know that the guys who serve you are the best. I just lost my wallet, along with all my ID and cards, at this gas station. We went back when we realized it was there, and they gave me everything back. I didn't miss a single coin. How nice it is to find people like this in life! May life reward them with much more than what they gave me. Thank you so much!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5216193713226017652/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzc1A2VVdnEAE
